prediction.reasoning: AMT (American Tower Corporation) is a REIT with relatively stable dividend-focused performance. Using historical volatility analysis, AMT typically exhibits annualized volatility around 20-25%. For a 20-day period, this translates to approximately 4-6% potential movement. The point estimate assumes modest upward momentum typical of dividend aristocrat REITs. Confidence intervals are based on normal distribution assumptions with daily volatility of ~1.3%, scaled for 20 days (√20 ≈ 4.47 scaling factor).
